tldr: Jonas Vingegaard attacked from 20 km to go on the Col de la Porte and won solo by more than two minutes over Valentin Paret-Peintre — the race-deciding ride. Tejada, Lenny Martinez and Izagirre completed the next chase group at +2:20. Vingegaard's career-rebooting Paris-Nice was effectively over here.

narrative.headline: Vingegaard solo from 20 km — the race-decider
narrative.body: 206.3 km, rolling-to-mountain finish at Colombier-le-Vieux. Vingegaard attacked solo with 20 km to go on the Col de la Porte; nobody could follow. Paret-Peintre held alone for second; Tejada led the chase group home.

gcImpact.headline: Vingegaard's GC moat
gcImpact.body: Two-minute solo. The GC question is over for the week barring catastrophe.
